mapper.select:
SELECT MEMBERID AS memberId, NAME AS name, EMAIL AS email, STATUS AS status, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, LAST_LOGIN_AT AS lastLoginAt FROM TBL_MEMBER
TYPE = 0
AND ( NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR EMAIL LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
AND STATUS = #{status}
ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMBER SET STATUS = CASE #{status} WHEN 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 WHEN 'SUSPENDED' THEN 0 END, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMBER
TYPE = 0
AND ( NAME LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' OR EMAIL LIKE '%' || #{search} || '%' )
AND STATUS = #{status}

SELECT MEMBERID AS memberId, NAME AS name, EMAIL AS email, PHONE AS phone, STATUS AS status, GENDER AS gender, TYPE AS type, BIRTH_DATE AS birthDate, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, LAST_LOGIN_AT AS lastLoginAt, DORMANT_AT AS dormantAt FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_MEMBER SET STATUS = 2, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBERID = #{memberId}
